table_trans: Annexure 1. 1.3 (a) The list of machinery required for waterways is set out in the Government Decision D. 14/12/2025. The machinery shall be the property of the contractor.

Annexure 1. 1.3 (a) The list of machinery required for waterways is set out in the Government Decision. 14/12/2025. At least 50 per cent of the machinery mentioned in the Government Decision is to be self-owned by the contractor. The remaining 50 per cent is to be charged by the contractor, even if the equipment is made available by lease or joint venture.
